page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance configured with 16 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory. Powered by an Intel Xeon Sapphire Rapids processor running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz, the instance features a 1:1 ratio of physical cores to vCPUs, meaning hyperthreading is disabled with exactly one thread per core. This architecture operates on the x86_64 instruction set and is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

The instance does not include local storage, requiring the attachment of external network-attached block storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 23 Gbps, facilitating data transfer between the instance and external storage or other network resources.

With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance provides a stable resource profile for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution without the overhead of shared-core resource contention. It is suitable for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and medium-sized database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon Sapphire Rapids processor operating at 2.7 GHz, the instance utilizes a non-hyperthreaded architecture with one thread per physical core on the KVM hypervisor. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 23 Gbps. With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance delivers predictable compute performance by avoiding resource sharing. It is designed for general-purpose workloads such as application servers, containerized deployments, and web serving environments.
